confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_fa18b567-c790-4a6e-afd6-6689e54a58c5 read back as received

payload.authority_rule: Default denied. Execution requires interactive Operator approval or a matching explicit Site capability grant for the requesting principal/role.
control_requirements: Use ephemeral browser context by default.
Redact cookies, tokens, secrets, signed URLs, and sensitive query strings from evidence.
Record structured evidence excerpts rather than raw full-page dumps by default.
Network inspection must report statuses and redacted URLs unless broader evidence is explicitly granted.
Mutation-like clicks require a separate command/execution intent and must not be smuggled under DOM inspection.
payload.motivation_evidence: In CPY smart-scheduling work, browser automation authenticated with the app diagnostic login route, opened /analysis/studio-week, clicked a non-mutating expander, and inspected the live Violated Rules DOM card. This produced useful evidence while also demonstrating why origin/path/interaction/redaction controls are needed.
payload.summary: Browser DOM inspection is useful for diagnosing live UI/data-flow behavior, but it must not become ambient browsing authority. Any role may request it, but use must be admitted by Operator approval or explicit Site capability grants scoped to principal/role/origin/path/interaction/evidence.
payload.title: Admit Operator-controlled browser DOM inspection as a governed effect capability
